query: UPDATE projects SET slug = LOWER(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(name, ' ', '-'), '.', ''), ',', '')) WHERE slug IS NULL OR slug = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3wsSeNnMFw5dboG.2c4b3d36d2f1 --database aSHZEBwUmWTuA7HAwuTg3z --execute UPDATE projects SET slug = LOWER(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(name, ' ', '-'), '.', ''), ',', '')) WHERE slug IS NULL OR slug = '';
